Class LegacyTextSerializerAdapter

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.fabric.codec.LegacyTextSerializerAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
TextSerializationAdapter
public final class LegacyTextSerializerAdapter extends Object implements TextSerializationAdapter
Strict adapter for legacy versions where Text serializer exposes static fromJson/toJsonTree methods (for example 1.20.x).

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • LegacyTextSerializerAdapter

      public LegacyTextSerializerAdapter()
      Creates a new instance of LegacyTextSerializerAdapter. Searches for Text serializer classes and reflective methods for JSON conversion.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the serializer class or methods are not found

  • Method Details

    • decode

      public net.minecraft.network.chat.Component decode(com.google.gson.JsonElement tree, Consumer<String> onError)
      Description copied from interface: TextSerializationAdapter
      Decodes a JSON element into a Minecraft Text object.
      Specified by:
      decode in interface TextSerializationAdapter
      Parameters:
      tree - the JSON element to decode
      onError - a consumer to handle errors during decoding
      Returns:
      the decoded Text object, or null if input is null

    • encode

      public com.google.gson.JsonElement encode(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component text, net.minecraft.core.HolderLookup.Provider registries)
      Description copied from interface: TextSerializationAdapter
      Encodes a Minecraft Text object into a JSON element.
      Specified by:
      encode in interface TextSerializationAdapter
      Parameters:
      text - the Text object to encode
      registries - the registry wrapper lookup for context-aware encoding (can be null)
      Returns:
      the encoded JSON element, or null if input is null

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: TextSerializationAdapter
      Gets the name of the adapter or the underlying mechanism.
      Specified by:
      name in interface TextSerializationAdapter
      Returns:
      the adapter name
